class.name: PlayFabAccounts
class.description: Accessed through [code]PlayFab.accounts[/code]. This service wraps client-safe PlayFab account management, profile, contact-email, account-link, and identity lookup APIs from the GDK PlayFab Services SDK. Methods require a signed-in [PlayFabUser], accept an optional request [Dictionary] using snake_case PlayFab field names, and return a completion [Signal] that emits [PlayFabResult]. Result payloads are converted to Godot Dictionaries and Arrays.

method.name: add_or_update_contact_email_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientAddOrUpdateContactEmail[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: get_account_info_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientGetAccountInfo[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_player_combined_info_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientGetPlayerCombinedInfo[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_player_profile_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientGetPlayerProfile[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_play_fab_ids_from_battle_net_account_ids_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientGetPlayFabIDsFromBattleNetAccountIds[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_play_fab_ids_from_google_ids_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientGetPlayFabIDsFromGoogleIDs[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_play_fab_ids_from_kongregate_ids_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientGetPlayFabIDsFromKongregateIDs[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_play_fab_ids_from_steam_ids_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientGetPlayFabIDsFromSteamIDs[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_play_fab_ids_from_steam_names_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientGetPlayFabIDsFromSteamNames[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_play_fab_ids_from_xbox_live_ids_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientGetPlayFabIDsFromXboxLiveIDs[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: link_battle_net_account_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientLinkBattleNetAccount[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: link_custom_id_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientLinkCustomID[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: link_open_id_connect_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientLinkOpenIdConnect[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: link_steam_account_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientLinkSteamAccount[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: link_xbox_account_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientLinkXboxAccount[/code] for [param user]. For this operation, [param request] must include [code]user[/code] with a signed-in GDKUser object; raw local ids are not accepted. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: remove_contact_email_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientRemoveContactEmail[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: report_player_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientReportPlayer[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: unlink_battle_net_account_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientUnlinkBattleNetAccount[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: unlink_custom_id_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientUnlinkCustomID[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: unlink_open_id_connect_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientUnlinkOpenIdConnect[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: unlink_steam_account_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientUnlinkSteamAccount[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: unlink_xbox_account_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientUnlinkXboxAccount[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: update_avatar_url_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientUpdateAvatarUrl[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: update_user_title_display_name_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementClientUpdateUserTitleDisplayName[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_title_players_from_xbox_live_ids_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementGetTitlePlayersFromXboxLiveIDs[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: set_display_name_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFAccountManagementSetDisplayName[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_profile_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFProfilesGetProfile[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_profiles_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFProfilesGetProfiles[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: get_title_players_from_master_player_account_ids_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFProfilesGetTitlePlayersFromMasterPlayerAccountIds[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: set_profile_language_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFProfilesSetProfileLanguage[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: set_profile_policy_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFProfilesSetProfilePolicy[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.
